summary: Eval cases controller: CRUD for test cases, A/B run execution via agent-tool-bridge, session replay, tool call metrics
Agent eval report: per-agent tool chat rate, send-public/private confusion matrix, tool success rate and latency percentiles
Skill registry: CRUD for skills (SKILL.md + openai.yaml), listSkills/resolveSkills/getSkill, external skill dirs
Agent prompt builder: skill injection (formatSkillDescriptors/formatSkillDocuments), expectations tagging, tool bridge env injection
Agent tool bridge: invocation context, dryRun mode, tool call event recording, public/private post interception
Agent eval metrics doc: expectations policy, tool call events, confusion matrix, eval report script usage
